description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a live game has any of the following statusCode values: T,TR,TS,TG,TV,TF,TC,TD,TB,TP,TL,TE,TA,TO,TI,TU,UR,US,UG,UV,UF,UC,UD,UP,UL,UE,UA,UO,U,UZ,UI,UU
steps.result: THEN 'SUSPENDED' is displayed top-center in the match-up header of the game tile
